work_order.project_title: Midnight Signals — AI Spooky Short for Teens
work_order.objective:
You are the creative-dev lane for 'Midnight Signals'. Continue Styleframes v1 but stay inside current environment limits (no OpenAI/httpx pin changes). Do NOT claim visual success without naming what is visibly on screen and attaching a screenshot path. Deliver a concrete, non-blocked Styleframes v1 handoff pack now, and mark all image-gen outputs as WIP if generation remains blocked.

Deliverables (create/update under project root):
1) styleframes/v1/sf_f02.png ... sf_f10.png — if photographic gen still blocked, keep current WIP placeholders but overlay per-frame acceptance notes directly on each tile (lantern left FG, tent back-center, right-side sign, central fire or phones-only, lens/grade).
2) styleframes/styleframes_contact_v1.png — refresh 2x3 grid; watermark PLACEHOLDER; include a bottom caption summarizing blockers in one line.
3) styleframes/styleframes_v1_blockers.md — keep the httpx/openai proxies mismatch analysis, but add a top TL;DR and a short, operator-ready approval command snippet.
4) lookdev/lighting_rigs.yaml — add/confirm rigs: fire_key (6:1), moon_rim (0.15 key), lantern_practical; include level ranges.
5) style_bible.md — append a v1 section with palette hexes, lens/DOF, grain, grade/LUT (from notes).
6) prompts/styleframes_v1/ — for each of f02,f05,f07,f08,f09,f10 write a prompt.txt and a negative.txt aligned to the boards; include crop guidance (1920x1088 -> crop to 1080).
7) masks/styleframes_v1/ — export alpha PNG mask layers from boards: tent.png, lantern.png, sign.png, fire.png for f05 and f10 (Pillow silhouettes acceptable).

Evidence requirement:
- At the end of your response, print a file index of everything you created/updated, and include at least one MEDIA path (e.g., styleframes_contact_v1.png).
- Also state one line beginning with 'Visibly on screen:' that describes what is visible in that MEDIA capture (e.g., '3x2 grid, tiles labeled F02,F05,... marked PLACEHOLDER/WIP; no tent/lantern/art shown').

Keep tone PG-13. If any step cannot be completed, produce the closest machine-usable fallback and cite the exact path.

Supervisor revision attempt 3/3.
Your previous result was reviewed and rejected. Do not restate the old result.
Repair the work directly in your lane, then return with fresh evidence.
Review findings:
- The response is still blocked and needs a concrete repair attempt instead of a status-only handoff.
Response requirements:
- Say exactly what you changed in this retry.
- Say exactly what you verified yourself in this retry.
- If anything is still blocked, name the blocker and the attempted repair already made.
- Do not hand the task back for operator review or approval.
- End with the required JSON block.

delivery_model.strategy_label: Lead -> Creative -> Game Dev -> App Dev
acceptance: Five teens are visibly rendered as characters, not seat markers or abstract geometry.
The boards visibly mirror the supplied camp reference: tent back-center, lantern left foreground, sign on right, central fire, moonlit forest palette.
Lighting reads as warm fire key plus cool moon rim with phones-only darkness where called for.
If the lane can only produce blocking diagrams or placeholder boards, it must report blocked and label the artifact placeholder instead of marking it review-ready.

stage_guidance.operator: Own scope, freeze the delivery target, and keep the handoffs honest.
stage_guidance.creative-dev: Define the creative target, vision guardrails, and artifact acceptance language before implementation drifts.
stage_guidance.app-dev: Own the app, tooling, portal, and review-loop support needed to make the chosen artifact reviewable and repeatable.

handoff_contract: freeze one primary delivery target before downstream implementation expands scope
treat creative-dev as the vision and acceptance guardrail for downstream lanes
treat game-dev as the owner of the playable implementation path once the vision is frozen
treat app-dev as the owner of portal, tooling, packaging, and review-loop support after the build path is clear
require each lane to leave a concrete handoff for the next lane instead of sending the operator back into open-ended review

verification_required: run the smallest local verification possible before claiming success

work_order.project_now: Animatic v3 (no audio) built at artifacts/animatic_v3_noaudio.mp4; creative-dev dispatched for Styleframes v1 (f02,f05,f07,f08,f09,f10).
